label: Transfer History
description: Recent transfer history with status, transaction references, amounts, and venue routing details.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file.

0.7.note: emptyMessage='No transfers yet' passed to TableWidget.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass. No fixes required.

1.1.note: Data from useAccountsData() → transferHistory — no inline fetch.

1.3.note: Org filter changes balances which inform context; transfer history is user-scoped by auth.

1.4.note: Transfer history scoped by auth user (queryKey includes user.id). Client sub-filter not applicable.

1.5.note: No strategy dimension for transfer history.

1.6.note: organizationIds=[] → all transfers shown (no org filtering on history).

1.7.note: Widget imports only from context. SAFTRecord type re-export via context is context-level concern, not widget-level.

l1.notes: Clean data flow. 1.4/1.5 N/A — transfers are atomic account operations.

l2.notes: Globally satisfied per spec §L2 2026-04-17 update. Commits 32ba8ab + f9f29ea.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ (real transfer history), paper ✓ (local entries from transfer widget in paper mode appear here), batch N/A (read-only history, not affected by batch mode).

3.2.note: Context exposes mode but transfer history widget is read-only — mode doesn't change widget behavior, only the source data.

3.5.note: Paper mode: addTransferEntry() from transfer panel creates local entries that appear in history — correct behavior, simulated transfers visible.

l3.notes: Agent checks pass. 3.3 N/A (read-only). 3.4 human pending.

4.1.note: onRefresh wired to refetchTransferHistory. Not a dead handler.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks on render path.

l4.notes: Agent checks pass. 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8 human pending — includes status filter dropdown behavior.

5.1.note: Target strategies: none — transfer history is an audit log for all transfer operations across all strategies.

l6.notes: L6 deferred — tests not written this pass.

7.1.note: No hex/rgb/hsl. emerald-500/amber-500/blue-500 are Tailwind named colors (allowed by L7.1).

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: filtered derived via useMemo with stable [transferHistory, statusFilter] deps. filterConfig object constructed inline in render — not in useEffect/useMemo deps, acceptable.

8.1.note: Fixed: replaced text-[10px] with text-micro on line 62 (status badge) after text-micro token landed in globals.css.

8.4.note:
Agent: no without alt, no interactive
. Human keyboard/screen-reader pass pending.

8.5.note: Human resize test at minW=4/minH=3 pending.

keepSeparate.rationale: History table and transfer form are complementary but distinctly sized widgets — history needs horizontal space, transfer panel is narrow. Keep separate for layout flexibility.

relationships.notes: Tightly coupled to accounts-transfer via addTransferEntry() — local entries from transfer panel appear immediately in history. detailOf relationship is architectural, not selection-based.

dataContract.notes: useTransferHistory() fetches paginated transfer records. Local entries (from addTransferEntry) prepended to API results for instant UI feedback.

gaps: DeFi on-chain transaction history not represented
No pagination UI exposed — large history sets may truncate silently
coverage.notes: Transfer types: Venue→Venue, Sub↔Main, Withdraw, Deposit. Status filter: Completed/Processing/Pending.

knownIssues: L1 context issue (not widget): accounts-data-context.tsx re-exports SAFTRecord type from lib/mocks/fixtures/trading-pages.ts and inlines MOCK_SAFTS directly. saftRecords data is never fetched — it is hardcoded mock data. Context-level fix deferred.

findings.description: accounts-transfer-history-widget.tsx — ~18 user-visible strings not wrapped in i18n helpers
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: accounts-transfer-history-widget.tsx:62 — text-[10px] on status badge, no text-2xs token exists
findings.fix: Replaced text-[10px] with text-micro on accounts-transfer-history-widget.tsx:62 (status badge className).

findings.description: accounts-data-context.tsx addTransferEntry — timestamp format string called toLocaleString without timeZone:'UTC', so new transfer rows showed viewer-local time in the history column
findings.fix: Added timeZone:'UTC' to the toLocaleString call in addTransferEntry. New transfer rows now timestamped in UTC.
